sc.political.s: FEC: In-N-Out Burger donations 2020-2024 totaled ~$3M+ to Republican/conservative causes and candidates; <5% to Democrats.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions, named pollution events, or certified sustainability benchmarks documented.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor practice findings or major class-action lawsuits documented as of 2024.
sc.charity.s: No public disclosure of named charitable programs with dollar amounts or revenue percentage.
sc.animals.s: No animal testing or cruelty-related claims documented; not applicable to QSR burger chain.
sc.guns.s: In-N-Out does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: No documented data breaches (HIBP) or FTC privacy enforcement actions on record.
sc.execPay.s: In-N-Out is privately held; CEO-to-median-worker ratio not disclosed publicly.

political.amt: ~$75,000–$180,000 in state-level lobbying and PAC contributions in recent cycles

charity.focus: Child abuse prevention, human trafficking, substance abuse recovery

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
